subject: Need COI for new contract ASAP
body: Hi, this is John Smith. I need a certificate of insurance for a new contract we just signed. The general contractor is requiring it by Friday. Our policy is BOP-2024-4471. Please add Apex Construction as additional insured. Thanks!
Hey, I just bought a new truck and need to add it to my policy. 2024 Ford F-150, VIN 1FTFW1E50NFA12345. Policy WC-88231. Thanks, Mike Davis

subject: Address change for policy
body:
Hello,

We have moved our office to a new location. Please update our address on file.

Old: 123 Main St, Suite 200, Dallas TX 75201
New: 456 Oak Ave, Floor 3, Dallas TX 75202

Policy number: GL-2023-8899

Thanks,
Sarah Jones

subject: Payroll update for workers comp audit
body:
Hi team,

Attached is our updated payroll for the workers comp audit. Our total payroll has increased from $2.1M to $2.8M due to new hires.

Policy: WC-2024-1122

Please let us know if you need anything else.

Best,
Lisa Chen
HR Director
Need to add a new driver to our fleet policy ASAP. His name is Carlos Rodriguez, DOB 03/15/1990, license TX-12345678. This is urgent, he starts tomorrow!!

subject: Increase general liability limits
body:
Hi,

I need to increase our general liability coverage limits from $1M to $2M per occurrence. A client is requiring higher limits for a commercial project.

Policy: GL-2024-5567

Please send me a quote for the increase.

Thanks,
Bob Wilson
Wilson Plumbing LLC
Hi I was in a fender bender this morning. Not sure what to do. My policy is AUTO-9922. Can someone call me back? Thanks, Maria
